title: LNC Certification Vetting Guide
subtitle: Know what truly qualified legal nurse consultants look like
description: LNCC certification separates qualified experts from imposters—but vetting credentials is time-consuming and risky. This guide shows plaintiff firms and insurers exactly what to look for, so you hire consultants you can trust.
bullets: Verify LNCC credentials in minutes—spot fakes and imposters
Understand LNCC exam topics: med mal, personal injury, litigation
State licensing vs. national LNCC: what really matters
Typical LNCC hourly rates: $150–$400+ depending on expertise

title: LNC Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Benchmark LNCC rates across regions and experience levels
description: Access current LNCC pricing data: hourly rates, retainer costs, and regional variations. Compare certified consultants by experience level to negotiate confidently and allocate your expert budget effectively.
bullets: LNCC hourly rates by region, certification, and experience
State-by-state pricing: premium markets vs. affordable regions
Expert testimony, retainer, and deposition fee benchmarks
Specialty pricing: malpractice, product liability, nursing home cases

title: Medical Record Review Checklist
subtitle: Review Medical Records Like a Certified Legal Nurse Consultant
description: Cut medical record review time in half. This LNCC-created checklist helps plaintiff firms and insurers identify critical evidence, liability drivers, and damages patterns without hiring a full-time legal nurse consultant.
bullets: Identify causation gaps and standard-of-care deviations
